{{CargoRelic
|name=Finlandia
|class_id=21272
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This piece was composed by Finnish composer Sibelius, premiered at the Paris World Exposition, and is regarded by Finns as Finland's second national anthem. The composer expresses Finland's national spirit through the piece, while also conveying a longing for freedom and independence. Its strong melody and distinct rhythm can evoke a sense of national pride in the audience, having a profound impact on the development of nationalist music.
|fame=34
|art=73
|fth=44
|civ=51
|tech=41
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
